The '''Imperial Fourth Attack Squadron''' was a [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], composed almost entirely of [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]]. The squadron was defeated during the [[Battle of Denab]], early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] were methodically eliminated one-by-one by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], exposing the weaknesses of the ''Victory''-class's slow [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] speed.<ref name="SWS" />
